Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Aether]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 1''' — The Aether can decide for a person to live two lives.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 2''' — The Aether is a force that twisted the entire sky during the ritual.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 2''' — The Aether is a source or medium related to magic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 2''' — The Aether can be manipulated via symbols.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — Spells require Aether to manifest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — The protagonist can disrupt the Aether around weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 4''' — Original spells were derived from natural patterns in the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 4''' — The narrator can nudge the Aether to push it into specific patterns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 5''' — Spells are cast by causing the meaning of words to resonate with the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 6''' — The Aether is a medium through which trigger words can echo.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 8''' — The Aether can be affected by resolve.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 8''' — Horizon's projected form is a reflection of her identity and emotions through the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 9''' — Aether can pause or witness moments.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 11''' — The protagonist can call upon the Aether to create sparks from their fingertips.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 11''' — Aether can be twisted into intricate designs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 11''' — Aether flowed between the ships to form a seal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 13''' — A word can shake the Aether and deconstruct a spell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — The Aether has a will.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — The Aether churns like a sea in storm during massive conflicts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — Symbols can flicker in the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — The Shepherd can draw up Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 21''' — Wizards swear on the Aether, though it is not a binding vow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 22''' — The Aether is a force that defines magic users based on how they define themselves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 23''' — Water can be conjured from the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 24''' — Aether is a sense used to detect the power of bullets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 27''' — The narrator calls upon power from the Aether using an incantation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 28''' — The Iron King hovers on a flow of Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 30''' — The Skimmer Drive produces a steady hum of Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 31''' — Aether is a form of energy that can flow through devices.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 31''' — Aether can be poured as water and used to spin in rings around hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 32''' — Aether is a medium through which sound can be carried.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 36''' — Dark water can be drawn from the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 37''' — The Last Horizon is gathering Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 38''' — Aether is a source of energy used for conjuring protective seals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 39''' — The Aether is a medium through which possible lives can be brought into reality.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 39''' — There is a theory that the Aether consists of energy leaking from other worlds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 40''' — The Aether is a concept or entity mentioned in conversation between the narrator and Omal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 42''' — The narrator can wrestle water gushing from the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 43''' — Benri can command the Aether to move himself through the void.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 44''' — Mages are more closely tied to the Aether the more powerful they are.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 45''' — Magic is tied to an individual's definition in the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 45''' — The Aether can answer requests for magic and control.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 46''' — Aether can be added to spells to introduce chaos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 46''' — The narrator channeled Aether through their staff.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 1''' — The Aether is a state of being that the Advocates insult.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 4''' — Aether can be manipulated to conjure dragons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 5''' — Aether is a substance that can be dispersed by proprietary alloys.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 9''' — Raion's Combat Art requires the support of the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 12''' — The Aether can be commanded to sweep an area clean.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 14''' — The Karoshan's force-blade block invokes the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 16''' — The Aether responds to Starhammer's desire for power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 16''' — The Aether can provide memories of alternate selves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 19''' — The Aether can tremble.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 25''' — The Aether is a force that can lead people somewhere.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 27''' — Aether is something one can swear upon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 32''' — The Aether prevents things from being too easy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 33''' — The Aether is a current that reflects the shape of the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 33''' — The Zenith Device bends the Aether to break the laws of reality.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 37''' — Red fire can be conjured from the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 39''' — Aether is a function that supersedes natural logic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 40''' — Aether can experience warps.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 40''' — Measuring behavior of the Aether is not exact.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 40''' — Leilari experiences a twist of the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 41''' — An android's appearance may be determined by its resonance in the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 44''' — The heart of any Combat Art is a truth embedded in the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 45''' — Only the Aether knows the outcome of Starhammer's battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 47''' — Aether can be thin or nonexistent in certain spaces.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 47''' — Cutting off the Aether affects both Horizon's systems and spells.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 48''' — The Aether can be naturally thinner in some places.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 50''' — The Aether does not waste details.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 51''' — The Aether is required to operate truth spells.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 52''' — The narrator uses the Aether for telekinetic leaps.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 55''' — Greth's species is blessed by the Aether.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 1''' — The Visiri third eye sees life energy as a reflection of power and vitality through the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 3''' — The Aether can be churned and frothing like a sea in storm during conflicting magical orders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 3''' — Aether is a medium through which sounds like shattering porcelain can be heard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 6''' — The Aether is a concept or entity that can hear Raion's wishes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 8''' — The Aether can cause Zenith Devices to awaken on their own.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 12''' — The Aether has been teaching Kyri hard lessons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 16''' — The Aether is a force that can be worked with directly by wizards.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 19''' — The Aether has things in store for the crew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 23''' — Aether is a resource found on certain planets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 24''' — Elementalists conjure and control elements from the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 24''' — Archmages explore the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 28''' — Wizards can see the evidence of Aether moving.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 33''' — The Aether answers when the Captain asks about worst-case scenarios.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 34''' — The Blue Divine Titan amplifies acts of Aether manipulation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 35''' — The narrator can read the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 36''' — Aether can bend fate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 38''' — The Aether is a medium that resonates with certain objects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 41''' — The Aether is weak inside Shadow Ark.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 43''' — The Aether was bending against the narrator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 45''' — The Aether prepared the Captain for future threats.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 2''' — Signing the contract involved invoking the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 6''' — Melerius claims his prompting comes from the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 7''' — The Aether can be read by certain individuals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 8''' — The Aether can be used to exert telekinetic force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 16''' — The Aether in the room ignited with magical symbols when the Captain became angry.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 17''' — Omal swears on the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — The Aether is mentioned in relation to tearing apart plans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 21''' — The Aether responded to Shyrax's anger with golden yellow flames.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 23''' — The Aether called for the Zenith Devices.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 23''' — The Aether may intend for the Zenith Devices to take up a unified purpose.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 23''' — The Aether awakened the Zenith Devices.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — The Captain used Aether to freeze the air around her father's computer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — The Aether sees individuals based on their story and actions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — The Aether is making the daughter of Omega the only identifiable member of Solstice to him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 30''' — The Aether is responsible for the inability to kill certain people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 34''' — Aether was used to lock ritual items in place.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 40''' — Omega wishes to be baptized in the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 40''' — Aethril eyes allow the user to see the flow of the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 45''' — Combat Arts and spells both require actions that resonate with the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 48''' — An approaching apocalyptic event has disturbed the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 48''' — The Aether shifted as the narrator was redefined.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
